positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial fauna creature, resembling a phoenix hybrid incorporating galaxy elements and bioluminescence. The creature is depicted in a powerful, mid-flight pose, filling the central negative space. Its wings are composed of nebulae, stardust, and swirling cosmic dust, with gradients of deep indigo, vibrant violet, and electric turquoise. The body has sharp, crystalline edges and glowing golden accents. The style is modern flat graphic design mixed with intricate cosmic art, ensuring clean lines, bold silhouettes, and perfect symmetry. Isolated on a neutral, slightly textured background to maximize print contrast. Vector art feel, high contrast, symmetry, divine, celestial, cosmic:
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, poorly drawn, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, logos, brands, out of focus, grainy
